name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups rhubarb, red, cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggs, sugar, flour, salt, and nutmeg in a bowl; mix well.
2. Place the rhubarb and strawberries into the prepared pie crust.
3. Pour the egg mixture over the fruit filling.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Top with the lattice crust, crimping the edges securely.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 40 minutes.
7. Fill any openings in the lattice crust with whole strawberries.
8. Serve warm or chilled, topped with vanilla ice cream if desired.
